title: Stainless Steel Colander 24cm with Handle Sturdy Base Dishwasher Safe Pasta Strainer Rice Sieve Metal Strainer for Cooking Kitchen Colanders and Food Strainers
features: Affordable Quality – Premium colander stainless steel design that’s built to last. Rust-resistant, durable, and perfect for any kitchen without breaking the bank.
Easy to Use– Lightweight yet sturdy with wide handles and a stable base. This stainless steel colander with handle is simple to lift, carry, and strain into the sink.
Stable Reinforced Base – Sturdy raised base offers enhanced balance and allows water to drain freely while resting securely in the sink or on countertops.
Versatile Kitchen Tool – Works as a strainer, sieve, or drainer. Ideal for everyday cooking, from rinsing salads to draining hot food. A must-have among sieves and strainers.
Sleek & Spacious – This 24cm metal colander adds style with a polished finish and generous capacity. Dishwasher safe and easy to store or hang after use.
description: Product Description Stainless Steel Colander Steel Colander is the perfect kitchen tool for all your straining needs. Whether you're straining pasta after a delicious boil, rinsing rice to remove excess starch for a fluffy texture, or washing fresh fruits and vegetables , this colander is perfectly suited for each task.
